creator: nakaji@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
An update of japanese/samba to samba-2.0.7-ja-1.2.
About samba-ja, please check the site of 'Samba Users Group Japan'
http://www.samba.gr.jp/project/samba-ja/index.html.en

I cannot get any response from the maintainer, Shinya Sasaki <pcmaster@osk3.3web.ne.jp>,
though I emailed to him about this update about a month ago.

Fix: 

A diff from japanese/samba can be downloaded from
http://www.rc.tutrp.tut.ac.jp/~nakaji/install/FreeBSD/ref/samba-2.0.7-ja-1.2.diff.gz
